scripts.check:news: python -m py_compile scripts/fetch_news.py && python -m unittest discover -s scripts -p "test_*.py"
scripts.check:industry: python -m py_compile scripts/build_industry_data.py scripts/validate_industry_data.py && node --check assets/js/industry-atlas.js && node --test scripts/test_industry_atlas.js && python scripts/validate_industry_data.py
scripts.check:intelligence: python -m py_compile scripts/validate_intelligence_data.py && node --check assets/js/signal-history.js && node --check assets/js/hardware-intelligence.js && node --test scripts/test_intelligence.js && python scripts/validate_intelligence_data.py
scripts.check:palette: node --check assets/js/palette-toggle.js && node --check assets/js/holodeck.js && node --test scripts/test_palette_toggle.js
scripts.check:mobile: node --check assets/js/holodeck-loader.js && node --check assets/js/holodeck.js && node --test scripts/test_mobile_hardening.js scripts/test_release_review_fixes.js
